title: Tender Herbal Croatian Cucumber Braise
description: A simple and delicious Croatian-inspired braise perfect for a weeknight dinner. Featuring tender cucumbers and herbs in a flavorful sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the caraway seed, if using, and cook for 30 seconds.
Add the cucumbers, oregano, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add enough water to the pot to cover the cucumbers. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the cucumbers are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let cool slightly.
Serve the braise hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
